title: The Dreaded Viewer
description: This brand new horror mod is super terrifying, it adds a new creature that lurks, and then strikes when you least expect it! Can you survive?
body:
# The Dreaded Viewer - a new horror mod

The Dreaded Viewer is a brand new horror mod that aims to build up paranoia, and fear as he lurks behind trees, mountains, and more. He quietly gets closer, and then he STRIKES! He can break down your door, he can fit through 1x2 spaces, and more. He has a new chase system, can you survive his chase and run away unharmed? Good luck!

He is a smart creature, just waiting for the opportunity to catch you off guard.

Download now to experience the terrifying reality of the Dreaded Viewer's new update, making him way scarier than the first version.

You can expect frequent updates, keeping the Dreaded Viewer fresh, and superb.

# Experience all of this in the brand new Dreaded Viewer 2.0 update!
